raw_source.title: [Remote] KCEX is looking for English BD Intern
raw_source.body:
## KCEX is a centralized cryptocurrency trading platform, We uphold the core values ​​of "user first, safety first, innovation driven".

## Responsibilities

1. Identify and build relationships with local KOLs/influencers, communities, projects, and other potential partners to promote KCEX in the North America and Europe market in order to achieve user growth.
2. As a representative of KCEX, to maintain a good relationship with KOLs and marketing channels to achieve long-term cooperation
3. Be responsible for the execution and performance of KOL marketing strategy, track and analyze channel cooperation results, and make adjustments to ensure optimal performance and maximum ROI
4. Keep abreast of local industry developments trends and competitor movements and strategize corresponding actions
## Requirements
1. Locate in North America
2. Understanding of the crypto market（North America ）
3. Speak English natively. Additional European languages are preferred.
## Nice to Haves
 European languages are preferred
## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: Full-time
- Remote or not: Remote

## Salary and Benefits
1000U-1500U / Month + Commission Bonus
Developers love job postings with accurate salary ranges.
This item must be filled in, otherwise the Rebase official account and other media channels may not be forwarded.

## Work Location  North America

## Contact  Aria
Email: yugongzi666@gmail.com
TG: [@EvelynF9](https://t.me/EvelynF9)

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]
